chunks.title: Azariah's Prophecy to Asa
chunks.reason: A prophetic speech encouraging King Asa and the people of Judah and Benjamin.

chunks.title: Asa's Reform and Covenant
chunks.reason: Narrative describing Asa's response to the prophecy, including reforms, assembly, sacrifice, and covenant renewal.

chunks.title: Further Reforms and Peace
chunks.reason: Continuation of the narrative detailing the removal of Maacah's idol, Asa's devotion, and the resulting peace.
